programme.title: Pretty Little Liars
programme.desc: Aria, Emily, Hanna and Spencer finally get answers about the night Ali disappeared. With their newfound knowledge of Ali's long-held secrets, can they figure out who 'A' is?

programme.title: Married At First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The Reunion Part 1. All the participants are back for one final dinner party and a lot of unfinished business.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Bozoma pulls out all the stops for the first night in Italy. Erika questions Sutton's motive for choosing Amanda as her roommate. Rachel receives a troubling text from home.

programme.title: Lego Masters: Australia Vs The World
programme.desc: In the Grand Final, the three teams create amazing builds of their choosing. 200 members of the public, along with Brickman, will determine the winners of LEGO Masters 2024.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A family wants a home on the water with some breathing room and a pool in Merritt Island, Florida. S17 E9.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After years following her husband's military career, a photographer decides to call the shots with a move to Whitsunday Islands. S172 E2.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Canadian wants a more nature-infused life in Costa Rica. But meeting her big expectations in the small town of San Mateo may be challenging.

programme.title: Threenews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Married At First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The Reunion Finale. The participants are all back for one final couch session with the experts and first look at videos of their MAFS journey.

programme.title: Mafs: After The Dinner Party
programme.desc: After The Reunion: Unseen footage exposes a new side of Danny, Rachel and Steven confront their devastating split, Steph and Bec reconcile, and Stella and Filip celebrate their engagement.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: The task force heads to Philadelphia to probe a double homicide and the abduction of a 14-year-old girl, while Ray worries after his father is hospitalized from an accident.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Bozoma pulls out all the stops for the first night in Italy. Erika questions Sutton's motive for choosing Amanda as her roommate. Rachel receives a troubling text from home.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: It's Halloween and Buddy's eldest son wants a haunted house to match his spooky cake. Carlo's crew create an intricate carved pumpkin cake.

programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Otto and Levi bring wind power to the remote cabin. Meanwhile, Atz Lee and Jane help homesteader Mike repurpose an old city house into a cabin. S8 E14.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys find a Montana homestead struggling through food, predator and power problems. Marty and Matt enlist a community of firefighters to help.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: The team travels to Guatemala on a mission to help patients at a rural hospital; the team faces a small community that is in desperate need of help, but they must identify who they can help most.

programme.title: Pretty Little Liars
programme.desc: The girls realise Ezra is in grave danger. While Aria stands watch over Ezra at the hospital, Alison and the other girls put together a plan to flush out 'A,'.

programme.title: Married At First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The Reunion Finale. The participants are all back for one final couch session with the experts and first look at videos of their MAFS journey.

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.desc: As Alesia scrambles to bury a regrettable text, gossip spreads faster than she can contain it. Chef Ben finds his footing in the galley until a broken oven threatens to derail the charter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End
programme.desc: The crew turns a koi pond into a backyard oasis for a family and their fish in Siesta Key, FL. S1 E1.

programme.title: Beach Hunters
programme.desc: Nashville doctors search for a relaxing getaway home in Folly Beach, South Carolina. S5 E4.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A family moving to St. Simons Island, Georgia, can't agree on a fixer-upper or new construction. S17 E10.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A globetrotter is finally ready to sit still and find a home in picturesque Amsterdam. S172 E3.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A microbiologist looks to relocate to Paris. She's eight months pregnant so finding a home before baby number two arrives may be a challenge.

programme.title: Threenews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguards head to North Bondi where they find a man dazed and confused after suffering a brutal attack. S12 E8.

programme.title: David Lomas Breakthrough
programme.desc: Tobias wants to meet the dad he's never seen who he was told was deported to Tonga. David seeks the breakthrough but his search in Tonga gives a surprising result.

programme.title: All New 9-1-1
programme.desc: Eddie faces an unthinkable personal crisis. Hen and Karen spring into action when thrown into a terrifying situation.

programme.title: Alert: Missing Persons Unit
programme.desc: When a customs broker goes missing, MPU discovers that she is an undercover FBI informant now being forced to transport a little girl over the border to her criminal father.

programme.title: Below Deck Down Under
programme.desc: As Alesia scrambles to bury a regrettable text, gossip spreads faster than she can contain it. Chef Ben finds his footing in the galley until a broken oven threatens to derail the charter.

programme.title: Chaos In Court
programme.desc: Witness a scandalous affair between a tutor and student. Then, an angry client's fist blindsides an attorney, and a man threatens to kill a judge.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The fall cattle round up takes an electrifying turn when a horse gets tangled in electric wire. And, Atz Sr. takes Bonnie on an epic hunting date. S8 E15.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys rescue a single-father homesteader facing threats of rockslides and bears in a Montana box canyon. Marty and Misty face an uphill battle.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Shaun Murphy must perform a risky surgery on a patient without electricity when the power suddenly goes out.

programme.title: Pretty Little Liars
programme.desc: Aria is haunted by the recent past events, while Emily, Hanna and Spencer try to wrap their head around the new normal, and Alison's home coming isn't so happy.

programme.title: All American
programme.desc: Simone is faced with her first college level tournament, Damon struggles with an assignment, and JR re-examines his identity. Plus, Amara continues to fight her battle.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina give an old four-bedroom home a colourful design in Cypress, California. S6 E15.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules
programme.desc: Lisa organizes the annual SUR photoshoot where new hostess Angelica catches Jason's eye. Natalie and Shayne go on their first date, but things go awry at Angelica's pool party.
